Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blue Light]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — The Blue Light begged for mercy when Alin killed Helgard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Blue Light manifests as translucent sapphire-like tendrils from the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Blue Light consists of sapphire tendrils that can bind and drain strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Blue Light can be called out of the ground in tendrils.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — The Blue Light manifests as luminous blue tendrils and tentacles thick as tree trunks that erupt from the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — The Blue Light can keep people unconscious without killing them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — The Blue Light is a voice that begs for mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The Blue Light pointed out that Alin's desire was not justice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Alin can summon a coil of Blue Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Blue Light tells Alin to save him if he can.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
